games.name: Chess
games.description: Play online vs. a friend over a real-time WebSocket connection, or vs. a Stockfish-backed engine. Voice control, post-game analysis, and curated puzzles included.
games.author: ProGameStore Team

versions.notes: Initial PGS release. Lifted from progamestore-online/chess (single-player only) with the multiplayer Worker re-enabled on the @progamestore/games useRooms() hook.

games.name: Checkers
games.description: Classic checkers with server-authoritative multiplayer. Mandatory captures, multi-jumps, king promotion. Play against a friend in real time.
games.author: ProGameStore Team
features: Full rules engine: mandatory captures, multi-jumps, king promotion

versions.notes: Initial release. Server-authoritative checkers engine with mandatory captures, multi-jumps, and king promotion.

games.name: Pong
games.description: The original video game, now with real-time multiplayer. Two players, two paddles, one ball. First to 11 wins. Canvas-rendered at 60fps with WebSocket state sync.
games.author: ProGameStore Team
features: Canvas rendering at 60fps, network sync at 20fps

versions.notes: Initial release. Real-time multiplayer pong with WebSocket relay.
